case_title: LEASECOMM CORPORATION VS. DERNIK GRIGORION et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GRIGORION, DERNIK DBA VD TRANSPORATION SERVICES DOES 1 TO 5O,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-25-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-20-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-10-2003

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-03-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-25-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-03-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
